aboutPage.title: About Mykola Mud Front-End Engineer
subtitle: Developer
Manager
Creative Person
infoDesc: I specialize in building modern, fast, and SEO-optimized frontend solutions for eCommerce — with a strong focus on headless Shopify architecture using Nuxt 3 and Vue.

I create intuitive, component-based user interfaces with clean code and modular design. My workflow often includes Shopify Storefront API, Metafields as CMS, and Liquid theme customization. I'm passionate about performance optimization, structured data (JSON-LD), and caching strategies (Nitro).
Over the years, I’ve worked across different industries, collaborating in Agile/Scrum teams and delivering flexible, maintainable frontends tailored to real business needs.
